summary: The SwingRatings algorithm indicates that PCAR is currently testing its Daily 100MA support zone near $118.61. Based on historical price action, bounces from this level have yielded a win rate of 41.2%. The asset has recently tested this support 4 time(s), which may have partially consumed buy-side liquidity. In the event of a successful bounce, traders should monitor overhead supply, particularly a primary horizontal resistance at $127.02 and a significant trendline confluence around $126.09 (formed by 19 points). This setup presents a structured risk-reward profile for swing positioning.
